form.formComment: Placed last time (19.38) at Hobart in a Grade 3/4, finishing second and beaten 3 lengths. Has three wins and four placings from 11 starts from the draw. Looks a leading chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Placed last time (19.38) at Hobart in a Grade 3/4, finishing second and beaten 3 lengths. Has three wins and four placings from 11 starts from the draw. Looks a leading chance.

form.formComment: Could manage only fourth last time but caught the eye the start prior when she was an easy winner scoring by 6 lengths in a Special conditions race at this track and clocking an excellent 15.99 for the 278m trip. Rates on top and can find winning form again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Could manage only fourth last time but caught the eye the start prior when she was an easy winner scoring by 6 lengths in a Special conditions race at this track and clocking an excellent 15.99 for the 278m trip. Rates on top and can find winning form again.

form.formComment: Ended last campaign with a seventh (30.49) in a SPEC at this track and returns after a 12 weeks break. Expect her to be prominent.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Ended last campaign with a seventh (30.49) in a SPEC at this track and returns after a 12 weeks break. Expect her to be prominent.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Hobart (19.89) in a Grade 4, finishing a 6 length seventh. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed three times. Looks suited and should go close.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fifth last time out over 278m at this track. Needs to find a bit more to test these.

form.formComment: Modest effort last time out when fourth over 340m at Hobart. Doesn't profile as a likely winner.

form.formComment: Backs up after finishing 6th on April 14 over 340m at Hobart in a Grade 3/4. Not up to this.

form.formComment: Starting from wide draw and hasn't shown anything recently, all starting at big odds. Not going well enough. Needs to lift.

formComments.comment: Starting from wide draw and hasn't shown anything recently, all starting at big odds. Not going well enough. Needs to lift.

form.formComment: Last start finished seventh on April 13 over 278m at this track behind Pop's Girl, beaten 7 lengths (16.64) in a Other. Expect improvement on the latest effort. Great chance to atone.
